reviews.review_msg: For me, Ralf is one of the best math teachers in my life. His lectures were super clear, and he answered my questions very well. Ralf explained difficult theories clearly so that I could understand and didn't use any rote memory. He is disorganized, but I don't mind. If you really hate someone being disorganized, then avoid him.

First, I need to indicate that this class is about OpenGL and is very hard. His labs are extremely long and hard, and he only provides very basic stuff in his class. If you'd like to take this class with him, be sure to prepare a handy OpenGL primer guide because the textbook he uses is not suitable for OpenGL beginners.
